lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਜਿਉ ਵੇਸੁਆ ਪੁਤੁ ਨਿਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vich haumai karam kamaavade jiau vesuaa put ninaau |
lines.english: Those who do their deeds in ego are like the prostitute's son, who has no name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਵਿਣੁ ਭਾਈਆ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa vin bhaaeea har kinai na paaeaa naau |
lines.english: Without the humble Saints, O Siblings of Destiny, no one has obtained the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਲਗਾ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee gur paaeaa har ahinis lagaa bhaau |
lines.english: By great good fortune, the Guru is found; embrace love for the Lord, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਤਾ ਜਾਤਿ ਤਾ ਹੋਈਐ ਗੁਰੁ ਤੁਠਾ ਕਰੇ ਪਸਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pitaa jaat taa hoeeai gur tutthaa kare pasaau |
lines.english: The father's status is obtained only if the Guru is pleased and bestows His Favor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਗਾ ਚਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man har har lagaa chaau |
lines.english: In my mind there is such a deep yearning for the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak braham pachhaaniaa har keerat karam kamaau |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has realized God; he sings the Lord's Praises through the actions he does. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਜੋਬਨਿ ਸਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag joban saas hai tab lag naam dhiaae |
lines.english: As long as there is youth and health, meditate on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai naam drirraaeaa har miliaa har prabh naau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has implanted the Naam within me; I have found the Lord through the Lord God's Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਦਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਲਸੀ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਤੇ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: chaladiaa naal har chalasee har ante le chhaddaae |
lines.english: Along the way, the Lord shall go along with you, and in the end, He shall save you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree tin kau jin har man vutthaa aae |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those, within whose minds the Lord has come to dwell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਿਓ ਸੇ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਏ ਪਛੁਤਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinee har har naam na chetio se ant ge pachhutaae |
lines.english: Those who have not remembered the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, shall leave with regret in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhur masatak har prabh likhiaa jan naanak naam dhiaae |3|
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny written upon their foreheads, O servant Nanak, meditate on the Naam. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਪਾਰਿ ਲਘਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee gur paaeaa gurasabadee paar laghaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By great good fortune, the Guru is found; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, we are carried across to the other side. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man har har preet lagaae |
lines.english: O my mind, embrace love for the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੁ ਉਪਾਇਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਵੈ ਲੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: har aape aap upaaeidaa har aape devai lee |
lines.english: The Lord Himself creates, He Himself gives and takes away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਮਨਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਸੇ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਕੇਈ ਕੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukhaa man paragaas hai se virale keee kee |
lines.english: The minds of the Gurmukhs are illuminated and enlightened; they are so very rare.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਮਤਿ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: har aape bharam bhulaaeidaa har aape hee mat dee |
lines.english: The Lord Himself leads us astray in doubt; the Lord Himself imparts understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree tin kau jin har paaeaa guramate |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who find the Lord, through the Guru's Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਵੁਠੜਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kamal paragaasiaa man har har vuttharraa he |4|
lines.english: Servant Nanak's heart-lotus has blossomed forth, and the Lord, Har, Har, has come to dwell in the mind. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਭਜਿ ਪਉ ਜਿੰਦੂ ਸਭ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਦੁਖ ਪਰਹਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har gur saranaaee bhaj pau jindoo sabh kilavikh dukh parahare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Hurry to the Sanctuary of the Lord, the Guru, O my soul; all your sins shall be taken away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਨੁ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: man har har japan kare |
lines.english: O mind, chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਮਈਆ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਿਤੁ ਭਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt rameea man vasai kiau paaeeai kit bhat |
lines.english: The All-pervading Lord dwells within each and every person's heart-how can He be obtained?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਆਇ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਚਿਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa satigur bhetteeai har aae vasai man chit |
lines.english: By meeting the Perfect Guru, the True Guru, the Lord comes to dwell within the conscious mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਹੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਜਤਿ ਪਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: mai har har naam visaahu hai har naame hee jat pat |
lines.english: My faith is in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. The Lord's Name is my status and honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਧਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਤੇ ਗਤਿ ਮਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: mai dhar naam adhaar hai har naamai te gat mat |
lines.english: The Naam is my Support and Sustenance. From the Lord's Name, I obtain salvation and understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੜਾ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤਿ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naam dhiaaeaa rang ratarraa har rang rat |5|
lines.english: Servant Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; He is dyed in the deep crimson color of the Lord's Love. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: har dhiaavahu har prabh sat |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord, the True Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਸਭ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਤੇ ਉਤਪਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur bachanee har prabh jaaniaa sabh har prabh te utapat |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Word, you shall come to know the Lord God. From the Lord God, everything was created. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਭਾਇ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: sevak bhaae vanajaariaa mitraa gur har har naam pragaas |
lines.english: They love to serve, O my merchant friend, and through the Guru, they are illuminated by the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੇ ਆਇ ਮਿਲੇ ਗੁਰ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa se aae mile gur paas |
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny, come to the Guru and meet Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਵਣਜੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੀਆ ਜਿਨ ਵਖਰੁ ਲਦਿਅੜਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan vanaj vaapaareea jin vakhar ladiarraa har raas |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is the trade of those traders who have loaded the merchandise of the Wealth of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਦਰਿ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਸੇ ਆਇ ਮਿਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukhaa dar mukh ujale se aae mile har paas |
lines.english: The faces of the Gurmukhs are radiant in the Court of the Lord; they come to the Lord and merge with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: har dhiaavahu saas giraas |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord, with every breath and morsel of food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਤਿਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਿਨਾ ਆਪਿ ਤੁਠਾ ਗੁਣਤਾਸਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jan naanak gur tin paaeaa jinaa aap tutthaa gunataas |6|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, they alone find the Guru, with whom the Lord, the Treasure of Excellence, is pleased. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗੀ ਤਿਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਿਨਾ ਰਹਰਾਸਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man preet lagee tinaa guramukhaa har naam jinaa raharaas |1| rahaau |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs embrace the Love of the Lord in their minds; they are continually occupied with the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||1||
